brief_title: Study on Breast Cancer Patient Perspectives of Exercise
official_title: Study on Breast Cancer Patient Perspectives of Exercise
brief_summary: The goal of the study is to establish the feasibility/willingness of breast cancer patients to delay surgery to do an exercise program, or be randomized to an exercise training program following treatment, and to see if that willingness correlates with prior physical activity history.

eligibility.criteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* women,
* breast cancer diagnosis,
* all races will be included.

Exclusion Criteria:

* men,
* those with no breast cancer (ductal carcinoma in situ),
* pregnant women,
* children

locations.facility: Abramson Cancer Center of the University of Pennsylvania

primary_outcomes.measure: Number of subjects providing completed surveys

sponsor: Abramson Cancer Center at Penn Medicine
